name: Dark Chocolate Glaze (for Decadence Cake)
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Ground or Chopped Almonds or Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the broken chocolate with butter in a small, heavy saucepan over medium heat. Stir frequently until smooth and pourable.
2. Remove from heat and stir in milk, light corn syrup, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Place the 9-inch cake layer on a rack over a baking sheet.
4. Allow the glaze to cool slightly, then pour it onto the center of the cake.
5. Let the glaze run down the sides of the cake.
6. Use a spatula to smooth the glaze and coat the sides evenly.
7. Decorate the side of the cake with chopped almonds or walnuts.
8. Chill for about 10 minutes until the glaze sets.
